scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:create && npm run deploy:get
scripts.deploy:create: gcloud functions deploy createVideoTask --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --source . --entry-point createVideoTask --memory 512MB --timeout 540s
scripts.deploy:get: gcloud functions deploy getVideoTaskResult --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --source . --entry-point getVideoTaskResult --memory 512MB --timeout 540s
scripts.status: gcloud functions describe createVideoTask --format='value(state)' && gcloud functions describe getVideoTaskResult --format='value(state)'
